scripts.check:worker: node --check worker/index.js && node --check worker/cutReuse.js && node --check worker/cutQuality.js
scripts.check:cuts-efficiency: node --check worker/index.js && node --check worker/cutReuse.js && vitest run src/test/video-cuts-efficiency.test.ts
scripts.check:cuts-quality: node --check worker/index.js && node --check worker/cutQuality.js && vitest run src/test/video-cuts-quality.test.ts
scripts.check:queue-reconciliation: node --check scripts/reconcile-deploy-backlog.cjs && eslint scripts/reconcile-deploy-backlog.cjs src/test/entrega-segura-1a-queue-reconcile.test.ts && vitest run src/test/entrega-segura-1a-queue-reconcile.test.ts
scripts.check:delivery: node --check webhook-deploy.cjs && node --check scripts/deploy-queue.cjs && node --check scripts/check-mcp-build.mjs && bash -n scripts/deploy-vps.sh && bash -n scripts/health-check-vps.sh && eslint webhook-deploy.cjs scripts/deploy-queue.cjs scripts/check-mcp-build.mjs src/test/entrega-segura-1a.test.ts src/test/entrega-segura-1a-deploy.test.ts src/test/mcp-build-gate.test.ts && DELIVERY_HARNESS=1 vitest run src/test/entrega-segura-1a-deploy.test.ts && npm run check:queue-reconciliation
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:worker && npm run check:delivery
scripts.lint:phase1c: eslint scripts/lint-ratchet.mjs scripts/check-lint-ratchet.mjs scripts/update-lint-baseline.mjs src/test/lint-ratchet.test.ts src/test/auth-email-payload.test.ts src/test/stripe-event-compat.test.ts src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx supabase/functions/_shared/auth-email-payload.ts supabase/functions/_shared/stripe-event-compat.ts supabase/functions/_shared/stripe.ts supabase/functions/auth-email-hook/index.ts supabase/functions/payments-webhook/index.ts
scripts.ci: npm run check:secrets && npm run check:lint-ratchet && npm run typecheck && npm run lint:phase1 && npm run lint:phase1b && npm run lint:phase1c && npm run lint:phase1d && npm run check:captions && npm run test && npm run check:worker && npm run check:delivery && npm run check:editorial-migration-artifacts && npm run check:mcp-build && npm run build
